SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.
This fixture omits the seconds component on some bearings and uses informal
phrasing like "more or less" on each course.

Part of the Northwest Quarter of Section 25, Township 15 North, Range 2 East,
Hendricks County, Indiana, described as:

Beginning at the Point of Beginning;

thence North 30 degrees 15 minutes East, 250.00 feet, more or less;
thence South 59 degrees 45 minutes East, 250.00 feet, more or less;
thence South 30 degrees 15 minutes West, 250.00 feet, more or less;
thence North 59 degrees 45 minutes West, 250.00 feet, more or less, to the
Point of Beginning.
